title: Cobblemon: Wild Catch
description: The only Cobblemon modpack you will ever need! Enhance your Cobblemon experience!
body:
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮ Immersive yourself in the world of Cobblemon!\ Catch over 200 different Pokemon! Evolve and become even stronger!\ Explore a vast world of over 50+ different biomes and brand new structures.\ Enjoy various activities like fishing, racing, and flying.\ Do you think you can catch them all? And be the very best?\ Hey what did that splash text say?!\ ╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
Developer's note: Hi! Thank you for checking out my first proper modpack. I've tried making modpacks in the past but I didn't like how they turned out and quickly abandoned them because they were a flop. Cobblemon has been my passion for a very long time. And after waiting for the big update to drop, it was all worth it. Thanks to the team behind Cobblemon, the modpack has become lighter and more optimized. I decided to try Blockbench and Blender for the first time to make 3D renders and images for the modpack, so I do apologize if they don't look as good as you hoped they would! Don't let this message fool you though! Just because the modpack is out, doesn't mean the modpack is finished. There will be more to do in the future when they release even more official updates, and I have more menus I need to make and improve! If you finished reading all this, you are the best! Okay, no more yapping. Go play the modpack!
